title: COVID-19 Disinfectants and sanitizers - Canada.ca
content:
## COVID-19 Disinfectants and sanitizers
Information about disinfectants and sanitizers for manufacturers and distributors in relation to COVID-19.

## Services and information

### Hard surface disinfectants and hand sanitizers
Regulatory response, expedited licensing, quality requirements, lists of approved products, information for manufacturers

### Importing and exporting hand sanitizers and disinfectants
Border import and export requirements
